description_long: This is a tall, modern office building with a rectangular footprint and a slightly curved facade on one side. The exterior is dominated by vertical white structural elements and large, dark-tinted glass panels, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The building features a prominent grid of windows, with a distinctive oval-shaped window pattern visible on one face, adding architectural interest. At the base, there is a small covered entrance area with a blue-and-white patterned canopy, suggesting a main entry point for occupants and visitors. The roof is flat and appears to be constructed from a light-colored material, possibly metal or concrete. The building sits on a green base, indicating landscaped surroundings or a plaza area.
description: A tall, modern office building with a curved facade, vertical white columns, dark glass windows, and a distinctive oval window pattern on one side. Features a covered entrance with a blue-and-white canopy and a flat roof.
description_view_0: Shows the building's side with vertical white columns, dark glass panels, and the covered entrance with a blue-and-white canopy at the lower right.
description_view_1: Displays the curved facade with closely spaced vertical columns and the main entrance canopy more centrally positioned.
description_view_2: Highlights the building's other side, with the curved edge and a continuous grid of windows, but the entrance is less visible.
description_view_3: Presents the face with the distinctive oval window pattern centered on the glass facade, with the flat roof and green base clearly visible.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular vertical grid with large, rectangular glass panels and a distinctive oval motif on one facade.
